title: I Knew I Loved You
why_this_song: I Knew I Loved You by Savage Garden (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "I knew I loved you before I met you"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "I knew I loved you before I met you"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I think I dreamed you into life"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And there it goes, I think I've found my best friend"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I think I dreamed you into life"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "knew" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "knew" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "loved" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I think I dreamed you into life
I have been waiting all my life

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "I Knew I Loved You" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "I Knew I Loved You" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "I Knew I Loved You" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "I Knew I Loved You" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "I Knew I Loved You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "I Knew I Loved You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
